message:
fix(combinator): add poll-after-completion guards to HedgeFuture and RetryFuture

Both futures could be polled after returning Poll::Ready, which
violates the Future contract and risks undefined behavior in
combinators that don't track completion state externally.

hedge.rs:
- Add `completed` bool field to HedgeFuture
- Set on both primary-won and backup-won paths
- Panic with clear message if polled after completion

retry.rs:
- Add RetryInner::Completed variant to the state machine
- Transition to Completed on all terminal paths: Ok, Failed,
  Cancelled, and Panicked
- Panic with clear message if polled in Completed state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
